postings.title: OReilly Automotive AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
postings.evidence: This is an AI tracker/analysis page, not a job posting. It reports on O'Reilly's AI adoption but does not advertise a specific role.

postings.title: Bryan Valencia
postings.evidence: Data Scientist at O'Reilly Auto Parts. Duties include 'leveraging data science', automating data pipelines, and performing RCA on data science processes.

postings.title: Savannah Harter
postings.evidence: Data Scientist at O'Reilly Auto Parts, Master Data Management team. Title and role indicate ML/data science modeling work.

postings.title: Lalitha Selvam
postings.evidence: Senior Manager – Data Analytics & Engineering at O'Reilly Auto Parts. 'AI-ready data systems' and strategic data initiatives indicate AI governance/leadership mandate.

postings.title: Hemant Kumar
postings.evidence: Principal Data & Analytics Engineer. Role focuses on ETL pipelines, database design, and data warehousing—data engineering without explicit ML/AI duties.

postings.title: Renjith Thomas Yohannan
postings.evidence: Sr Manager Data and Analytics Engineering. Focus on data infrastructure, warehousing, and analytics—no explicit AI/ML modeling duties mentioned.

postings.title: Justin Broaddus
postings.evidence: Data Engineer I. Duties include ETL pipelines, SQL, and data integration—data engineering without AI/ML component.
